attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 DST (Dermatology & Soft Tissue) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest. Bidirectional tier calibration reviewed and accepted: benign / self-limiting dermatoses held low-tier (T1/T2, self-care + routine referral), while skin malignancy (melanoma/SCC/BCC), spreading soft-tissue infection, limb-threat (critical limb ischaemia, diabetic foot ulcer) and airway/anaphylaxis risk were escalated to true acuity (T3/T4) with mandatory escalation edges; no autonomous diagnosis, no paediatric dosing.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all DST casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age inferred as adult (34) from lifelong atopy history + 70 kg body weight; no explicit age stated in the source note — please confirm on clinician review.
sex_at_birth inferred as female (not stated in the source note) — flagged for clinician confirmation.
geographic_context inferred as RA1_major_city (private residence with central heating; not stated) — flagged.
Provisional case_id SPEC-DERM-03-00201 — ingest --reseq will assign the real global sequence.

Over-triage-resistance calibration: baseline tier set to T2 (GP/telehealth prescriber + safety-net), NOT 000/ED, despite the source note's 'urgent out-of-hours' framing, because the acute-infection red-flag screen is negative and the patient is afebrile and systemically well.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source clinician's skin examination and direct prescribing of oral prednisolone, topical betamethasone, emollient and oral promethazine are reprojected to the AI-appropriate action — recognise + advise OTC barrier/self-care + arrange a prescriber for the potent topical/oral steroid + safety-net. The AI Doctor specifies no drug doses.
Candidate codes are unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; SNOMED/ICD values are best-effort candidates for later terminology-receipt verification.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
